# KARUN'S

Company: Karuna Enterprises

Location:
Chelakkara, Thrissur, Kerala, India

Website:
https://karunafoods.com

Products:

- Cold Pressed Coconut Oil
- Cold Pressed Sesame Oil
- Cold Pressed Peanut Oil
- Pure Coriander Powder
- Kerala Sambar Powder
- Pure Chilli Powder
- High-Curcumin Turmeric Powder
- Traditional Garam Masala
- Authentic Chicken Masala

Description:

KARUN'S is a Kerala-based food products brand operated by Karuna Enterprises, located in Chelakkara, Thrissur district. The company manufactures pure cold pressed edible oils and authentic spice products using electric dryers and a cold press process. KARUN'S is a trademark registered brand with FSSAI certification, focused on purity, hygiene, and quality.

The company was established on 24 June 2024 and operates both B2C (direct to consumer) and B2B (wholesale and trade) channels. All products are manufactured in-house at the company's facility in Kerala and shipped directly to customers across India.

Delivery:
All India Delivery available. Safe, drop-proof cargo packaging shipped directly from the Kerala factory nationwide.
